title: kmod bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[31-12.0.1]
- Add improvement to modprobe to handle UEK8 packaging better [Orabug: 37771059] (Harshit Mogalapalli)
- weak-modules: Fix add_kernel to handle suffix [Orabug: 34623248] (Todd Vierling)
- add weak-modules patch for [Orabug: 26672773]

[31-12]
- check weak-updates directory exists before using it
- Resolves: RHEL-109793
full_text:
[31-12.0.1]
- Add improvement to modprobe to handle UEK8 packaging better [Orabug: 37771059] (Harshit Mogalapalli)
- weak-modules: Fix add_kernel to handle suffix [Orabug: 34623248] (Todd Vierling)
- add weak-modules patch for [Orabug: 26672773]

[31-12]
- check weak-updates directory exists before using it
- Resolves: RHEL-109793

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20235-0.html
